name: Spring Shedding
description:
"I think it's time."

[[ Cyclical grooming ]]

✧ Once a year, Milo and his other canine friends have to trim themselves up for the summer. It's harmless really, all he's doing is preparing himself for the hot as hell heat that's about to roll up on him. However, he didn't have you last year. So let's just say when he felt like it was time to do some grooming.

~ He knew exactly who to call for help ~

Song of the day: Soaked

— ✧ —

"MOONBEAM ICE CREAM TAKING OFF YOUR BLUE JEANS—" God I hate that song. And the funny thing is that it's actually blowing up around the world. Probably from how ASS it is.

Greetings fellow peoples! News flash, it's hot as hell! So why not stay inside in the nice Air conditioned house with some "moonbeam" ice cream and my cutesy delusional self! That's definitely not a recipe for disaster.

I better hurry up, I don't want to keep Milo (your husband) waiting. Just know that I love you all and stay COOL! its not Diva like to die of heatstroke.

Love you!!

XOXO

— ✧ —
creator: Thatdude23
